user_query: For all days that don't have a dinner planned, add a cheap dinner option.

fields.name: YYZ Food Court - Budget Dinner
fields.description: Quick, inexpensive dinner at the airport food court with multiple fast-casual vendors — good for a filling meal before departure.

insertion_point.reasoning: Day 10 has no dinner and the flight departs at 6:00 PM. Inserting at position 2 places a short, cheap dinner between the 4:00 PM airport snack and the 6:00 PM departure, allowing time to eat and reach the gate.
